violations.text: The establishment is lacking a dumpster outside. Per interview of staff, once the snow clears, dumpster will be placed in designated area outside. -A receptacle shall be provided in each area of the FOOD ESTABLISHMENT or PREMISES where REFUSE is generated or commonly discarded, or where recyclables or returnables are placed. -PIC will send a picture once dumpster has been placed outside. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026
